rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when referring to component ports.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE.
Omit unsafe Boolean range clauses unless port is explicitly AGREE bool.
Do not invent numeric bounds not stated in the requirement.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type scopes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations.
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables.
Do not assume numeric bounds for ports not explicitly constrained in the requirement.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
